Name: EquipParamWeapon
Description:
Defines weapon types and each affinity.
Includes arrows and bolts. Responsible for scaling shown on certain consumables.
IDs not ending in a multiple of 100 are ignored.
Permitting affinities on a weapon without affinity rows at the correct IDs will result in the nearest 10000 being used.
SpEffects specified here can be modified by upgrades in ReinforceParamWeapon.

Fields.Name: Model Category
Fields.Description: The equipment model category used by this equipment.

Fields.Name: Model Gender Category
Fields.Description: The equipment gender category used by this equipment.

Fields.Name: Model ID
Fields.Description: The model ID to use for this equipment.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: The icon ID to use for this equipment.

Fields.Name: Weapon Category
Fields.Description: The weapon category of this equipment.

Fields.Name: Weapon Animation Set
Fields.Description: The weapon animation category. Determines the base animation set the weapon uses.

Fields.Name: Weapon Idle Animation Set: 1H
Fields.Description: The weapon idle animation category. Determines the idle animations used when held one-handed.

Fields.Name: Weapon Idle Animation Set: 2H
Fields.Description: The weapon idle animation category. Determines the idle animations used when held two-handed.

Fields.Name: Equipped in Right Weapon Slot
Fields.Description: If ON, this equipment can be equipped in the right weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Equipped in Left Weapon Slot
Fields.Description: If ON, this equipment can be equipped in the left weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Equipped in either Weapon Slot
Fields.Description: If ON, this equipment can be equipped in either weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Equipped in Arrow Slot
Fields.Description: If ON, this equipment can be equipped in arrow ammunition slot.

Fields.Name: Equipped in Bolt Slot
Fields.Description: If ON, this equipment can be equipped in bolt ammunition slot.

Fields.Name: Is Throwable
Fields.Description: If ON, weapon can be thrown.

Fields.Name: Has Sheath
Fields.Description: If ON, weapon has a sheath.

Fields.Name: Enables Guard
Fields.Description: If ON, this weapon will guard with L1 when equipped with left hand.

Fields.Name: Enables Parry
Fields.Description: If ON, this weapon will arry with L2 when equipped with left hand.

Fields.Name: Enables Sorcery
Fields.Description: If ON, this weapon will cast sorcery when attacking.

Fields.Name: Enables Miracles
Fields.Description: If ON, this weapon will cast miracles when attacking.

Fields.Name: Maximum Ammunition Count
Fields.Description: The maximum amount of ammunition that can be carried (for ammunition weapon entries).

Fields.Name: Wandering Equip ID
Fields.Description: Replacement equipment ID for wandering ghosts.

Fields.Name: Behavior Variation ID
Fields.Description: Used to determine the action parameters to use for this weapon's attacks.

Fields.Name: Menu Display: Normal
Fields.Description: The attack type for menu display.

Fields.Name: Menu Display: Strike
Fields.Description: The attack type for menu display.

Fields.Name: Menu Display: Slash
Fields.Description: The attack type for menu display.

Fields.Name: Menu Display: Thrust
Fields.Description: The attack type for menu display.

Fields.Name: Weight
Fields.Description: Weight [kg].

Fields.Name: Durability
Fields.Description: The initial durability of this equipment.

Fields.Name: Max Durability
Fields.Description: The maximum durability of this equipment.

Fields.Name: Damage: Physical
Fields.Description: The base Physical attack power.

Fields.Name: Damage: Magic
Fields.Description: The base Magic attack power.

Fields.Name: Damage: Fire
Fields.Description: The base Fire attack power.

Fields.Name: Damage: Stamina
Fields.Description: The base stamina attack power.

Fields.Name: Damage: Poise
Fields.Description: The base poise attack power.

Fields.Name: Parry Attack
Fields.Description: The base parry attack damage value. Applied to the enemy parry defense value.

Fields.Name: Parry Defense
Fields.Description: The base parry defense value. Compared against enemy parry attack value.

Fields.Name: Base Repel: Defense
Fields.Description: The base repel value when guarding. If a blocked attack has a repel attack value less than the repel defense value, the attack will bounce.

Fields.Name: Base Repel: Attack
Fields.Description: The base repel value when attacking. If the victim has a repel defense value greater than the repel attack value, the attack will bounce.

Fields.Name: Parry Damage Duration
Fields.Description: The duration of parry damage. It is capped by the duration set in the TAE. In frames.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Physical
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when this weapon is guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Magic
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when this weapon is guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Fire
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when this weapon is guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Slash
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Strike
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Thrust
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Poison
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Toxic
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Bleed
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Stability
Fields.Description: Defense power against stamina drain from enemy attacks when guarding correctly.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Guard Angle
Fields.Description: Defense generation range angle when guarding with a weapon (horizontal direction). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Guard Damage Level
Fields.Description: When guarding, the guard animation offset to use when being attacked.

Fields.Name: Guard: Knockback Absorption %
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to knocback speed when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard: Knockback Repulsion %
Fields.Description: The counter-repulsion to the opponent when guarding (after suffering an attack).

Fields.Name: Correction: STR
Fields.Description: The multiplier to the damage corrected by this specified stat.

Fields.Name: Correction: DEX
Fields.Description: The multiplier to the damage corrected by this specified stat.

Fields.Name: Correction: INT
Fields.Description: The multiplier to the damage corrected by this specified stat.

Fields.Name: Correction: FTH
Fields.Description: The multiplier to the damage corrected by this specified stat.

Fields.Name: Requirement: STR
Fields.Description: The required level of the specified stat to properly wield this weapon.

Fields.Name: Requirement: DEX
Fields.Description: The required level of the specified stat to properly wield this weapon.

Fields.Name: Requirement: INT
Fields.Description: The required level of the specified stat to properly wield this weapon.

Fields.Name: Requirement: FTH
Fields.Description: The required level of the specified stat to properly wield this weapon.

Fields.Name: Damage Correction Graph
Fields.Description: Determine the calculcation correction graph to use when correcting damage.

Fields.Name: World Tendency Correction Type
Fields.Description: The attack power correction type to use based on world tendency.

Fields.Name: Apply Luck Correction
Fields.Description: If ON, applies attack correction based on luck.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption Invalidation
Fields.Description: Guard cut rate invalidation ratio (-100 to 100)  Normal at 0 / Completely invalidated at -100 / Doubles the defense effect of the opponent at 100  -50, 100% cut shield becomes 50% cut Become

Fields.Name: Damage Adjustment %: Demon
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier applied to targets that are classified with isDemon.

Fields.Name: SpEffect on Hit: 1
Fields.Description: A SpEffect to apply to the victim when this weapon hits.

Fields.Name: SpEffect on Hit: 2
Fields.Description: A SpEffect to apply to the victim when this weapon hits.

Fields.Name: SpEffect on Hit: 3
Fields.Description: A SpEffect to apply to the victim when this weapon hits.

Fields.Name: Resident SpEffect Behavior ID
Fields.Description: A SpEffect to apply to the wielder of this weapon.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement Type
Fields.Description: The reinforcement menu type to use for this weapon.

Fields.Name: Critical Hit %
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to critical hits.

Fields.Name: Source ID
Fields.Description: The source ID to use for this equipment when changing its base form.

Fields.Name: Upgrade Material ID
Fields.Description: The material requirements for improving this equipment.

Fields.Name: Sort ID
Fields.Description: The ordering ID used to sort this part in the menu.

Fields.Name: Is Reinforcable
Fields.Description: If ON, this weapon can be reinforced via the reinforcement mechanic.

Fields.Name: Ammunition Distance %
Fields.Description: Increase the attentuation range of ammunition by the specified multiplier.

Fields.Name: Achievement ID
Fields.Description: The achievement ID this equipment is associated with, if any.

Fields.Name: Sequential Achievement ID
Fields.Description: The sequential achievement ID this equipment is associated with, if any.

Fields.Name: Repair Value
Fields.Description: The price required to repair this part. Repair cost is calculated using this and durabilityMax

Fields.Name: World Tendency ID
Fields.Description: The world tendency ID to use for this item.

Fields.Name: Is Buffable
Fields.Description: If ON, this weapon be buffed via a tool or spell.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement Value
Fields.Description: The reinforcement price for this part.
